THE STORY

Designed with purpose

Freshphysics a.k.a Nenok
Kit Designer

Nenok, a talented Shah Alam street artist and well known circa 2008. His enthusiast and skill in designing arts, grafitti and even this kit is made from that passion. Every kit he designs for Kelapa Bali FC ended up as a masterpiece.

Follow designer

The Fabric

Jacquard, 140gsm patterned polyester mediumweight, breathable, and built to move sweat away from the skin during a specific football match. Raglan-cut sleeves for a freer range of motion that suits for a long match. On a side note, this fabric was recommended by Nenok .

The Colours

Different jersey, different story. As our home kit already striking with red and yellow (Inspired from Selangor FC), White and Deep navy was our choice to depict that we strikes in silent when we are on an opponent ground.

The Pattern

The diagonal lines running across the body are a nod to France's World Cup 2026 campaign, the same restless, forward-leaning stripe language seen on Les Bleus' kits, reworked here in Kelapa Bali FC's navy to carry that same energy onto our friendly match.

The Slogan

40200, where it all started. It's the postcode of the field this club calls home, and it carries more than an address: the love for football, the friendships built on it, and everything that's grown out of both.
